title: Bash Enchantment
description: Ever wanted to be able to have the Knockback enchantment on your shield?
body:
# 📢Announcement
All future updates to this datapack will be available only on [Way too many Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/project/silvers_way-too-many-enchantments!), this will also mean this project will be permenantly archived until further notice.

# Description:
Ever wanted to be able to have the Knockback enchantment on your shield? well with the Bash enchantment, you can! its basically a weaker version of knockback II or punch II, but it's coded to have the knockback strength somewhere in the middle of level I and II.

You will gain +0.5 knockback strength per level, wit the max being Level III!


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
- [Way too many Enchantments!](https://modrinth.com/collection/90b6VDPP)
